{{Quote|I happen to know that a very important prisoner is being kept here before his transfer to Coruscant. We must free Luke Skywalker.|[[Brenn Tantor]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
Sometime between [[0 ABY/Legends|0]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] constructed a '''prison''' on the edge of a canyon on [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]]. This prison was used in 3 ABY to hold [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] while he was awaiting transport to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. At the same time, his captor, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]], was imprisoned there for having refused an order to massacre a [[Abridon refugee camp|refugee camp]] shortly after Skywalker's capture on [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]].

[[File:Brenn_guarded.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Brenn Tantor]] in his outdoor cell.]]
Tantor, however, was [[Escape from Kalaan|rescued]] by [[Kalaan defectors|his own men]], who helped him defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. To gain favor with the Rebels, Tantor and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] stormed the prison and freed Skywalker. Also taking the [[Tracked Mobile Base]], which had been parked at the prison, Tantor, Skywalker, and the stormtroopers reached [[Tyr Taskeen]]'s base, where they were evacuated to a waiting fleet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
